ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, FURTHER PROCEEDING ON RECOGNITION OF FOREIGN COUNTRY JUDGMENT. THE COURT EXPLAINS TO COUNSEL REGARDING THE NEED TO VACATE THE ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE AS AN ACTION PURSUANT TO CCP 1718(A) AND TO SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FILED ON NOVEMBER 30, 2018 AND TO HAVE A NEW ORDER ISSUED. ORDER TO BE PREPARED BY THE COURT. PARTIES TO SUBMIT A STIPULATION AND ORDER REGARDING A BRIEFING SCHEDULE BY EMAIL. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN CSR#6185, EMAIL: TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Off Calendar

Further Proceeding On Recognition Of Foreign Country Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Hsueh, Esq., Thoits Law, Telephone 650-327-4200, appearing for Plaintiff;
Kaitlyn J. Sikora, Clark Hill, Telephone 415-984-8535, appearing for Respondent, Oisen Heneghan;

Further Proceeding On Recognition Of Foreign Country Judgment

The Court explains to counsel regarding the need to vacate the order GRANTING MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE AS AN ACTION PURSUANT TO CCP 1718(A) AND TO SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE filed on November 30, 2018 and to have a new order issued. Order to be prepared by the Court.

Parties to submit a stipulation and order regarding a briefing schedule by email.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Reporter: Anthony Vaughn CSR#6185, email: tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Case As An Action Pursuant To Ccp 1718(A) And To Set A Case Management Conference
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Hsueh, Esq. 650-327-4200 of Thoits Law for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ALLIED IRISH BANKS PLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Case As An Action Pursuant To Ccp 1718(A) And To Set A Case Management Conference.

Plaintiff Allied Irish Banks PLC's motion to reclassify the case as an action per CCP 1718(a) is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
